name: Nocona Lodge at Palo Duro Canyon
description: Nocona Lodge at Palo Duro Canyon is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Canyon, TX. There is 1 outdoor concrete court. This is a dedicated court with a permanent net and lines. The court is private.

name: Paul Lindsey Park
description: Paul Lindsey Park is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Canyon, TX. There are 3 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free. Reservations are not available. Amenities include lights.
